Mosa Tea
mosatea_usa
 43w
Do you know what Mosa stands for? 👀

Our name is a tribute to the rich origins of boba culture—rooted in the vibrant heart of Taiwan, the very birthplace of bubble tea.

Centuries ago, as Portuguese explorers sailed past this lush, mountainous island, they were captivated by its breathtaking beauty. They named it Ilha Formosa—Beautiful Island. From Formosa, Mosa was born.

It’s more than just a name. It’s a celebration of heritage, of beauty discovered and shared. Every cup we serve carries the spirit of Taiwan—authentic, timeless, and deeply connected to the island that started it all.

#mosa #formosa #comingsoon
